name: VALIDATED
what_it_solves: Tier 'VALIDATED' in the 4-level SL evidence hierarchy.
how_it_solves: Never auto-assigned by the fuser; only reachable via source == 'frozen_receipt' (invariant #1).
why_it_exists: Prevents the pipeline from claiming clinical-grade evidence without an explicit, human-owned frozen receipt.

attributes.entry_criterion: Highest tier. Score ≥ 10 AND clinical == POSITIVE.
